languages.text: Благодаря усилиям Вольного Торговца был найден убийца отпрыска Гапраков — Изимонд Зауэрбэк, действовавший по приказу Камиллы Драйвстем. Однако все они стали жертвами изящной манипуляции Ювенны фон Валанциус.

traits.locale_text: [ДРАФТ]Вы узнали, что войска ГАпраков были уничтожены, сам грав Оведий выжил, но его убил Изимонд по приказу Камиллы. И при этмо всем за ниточки графиню дергала Ювенна фон Валанциус.

Благодаря усилиям Вольного Торговца был найден убийца отпрыска Гапраков — Изимонд Зауэрбэк, действовавший по приказу Камиллы Драйвстем. Однако все они стали жертвами изящной манипуляции Ювенны фон Валанциус.

languages.text: Thanks to the Rogue Trader's efforts, the murderer of the Gaprak scion has been found. The killer is Isimond Sauerback, who was acting on the orders of Camilla Drivestem. All of them, however, were simply the victims of an elegant manipulation devised by Juvenna von Valancius.
languages.original_text: Благодаря усилиям Вольного Торговца был найден убийца отпрыска Гапраков — Изимонд Зауэрбэк, действовавший по приказу Камиллы Драйвстем. Однако все они стали жертвами изящной манипуляции Ювенны фон Валанциус.

traits.locale_text: Thanks to the Rogue Trader's efforts, the murderer of the Gaprak scion has been found. The killer is Isimond Sauerback, who was acting on the orders of Camilla Drivestem. All of them, however, were the victims of an elegant manipulation devised by Juvenna von Valancius.

Thanks to the Rogue Trader's efforts, the murderer of the Gaprak scion has been found. The killer is Isimond Sauerback, who was acting on the orders of Camilla Drivestem. All of them, however, were the victims of an elegant manipulation devised by Juvenna von Valancius.

Thanks to the Rogue Trader's efforts, the murderer of the Gaprak scion has been found. The killer is Isimond Sauerback, who was acting on the orders of Camilla Drivestem. All of them, however, were simply the victims of an elegant manipulation devised by Juvenna von Valancius.

languages.text: Dank der Bemühungen {mf|des Freihändlers|der Freihändlerin} konnte der Mörder des Gaprak-Sprosses gefunden werden. Der Mörder ist Isimond Sauerback, der auf Befehl von Camilla Drivestem handelte. Sie waren allerdings alle Opfer einer eleganten Manipulation durch Juvenna von Valancius.
languages.original_text: Thanks to the Rogue Trader's efforts, the murderer of the Gaprak scion has been found. The killer is Isimond Sauerback, who was acting on the orders of Camilla Drivestem. All of them, however, were simply the victims of an elegant manipulation devised by Juvenna von Valancius.

traits.locale_text: Dank der Bemühungen {mf|des Freihändlers|der Freihändlerin} konnte der Mörder des Gaprak-Sprosses gefunden werden. Der Mörder ist Isimond Sauerback, der auf Befehl von Camilla Drivestem handelte. Sie waren allerdings alle Opfer einer eleganten Manipulation durch Juvenna von Valancius.

languages.text: Grâce aux efforts {mf|du libre-marchand|de la libre-marchande}, le meurtrier de l'héritier des Gaprak a été retrouvé. Le tueur n'est autre qu'Isimond Sauerback, qui agissait sous les ordres de Camilla Drivestem. Ils n'étaient cependant que des pions dans un plan subtil élaboré par Juvenna von Valancius.
languages.original_text: Thanks to the Rogue Trader's efforts, the murderer of the Gaprak scion has been found. The killer is Isimond Sauerback, who was acting on the orders of Camilla Drivestem. All of them, however, were simply the victims of an elegant manipulation devised by Juvenna von Valancius.

traits.locale_text: Grâce aux efforts {mf|du libre-marchand|de la libre-marchande}, le meurtrier de l'héritier des Gaprak a été retrouvé. Le tueur n'est autre qu'Isimond Sauerback, qui agissait sous les ordres de Camilla Drivestem. Ils n'étaient cependant que des pions dans un plan subtil élaboré par Juvenna von Valancius.

languages.text: 由于行商浪人的行动，杀害贾帕克家子嗣的凶手已经找到。凶手是伊西蒙德·苏尔贝克，他受卡米拉·德莱夫斯塔指使。然而，他们所有人都只是尤文娜·冯·瓦兰修斯精心操纵的棋子。
languages.original_text: Thanks to the Rogue Trader's efforts, the murderer of the Gaprak scion has been found. The killer is Isimond Sauerback, who was acting on the orders of Camilla Drivestem. All of them, however, were simply the victims of an elegant manipulation devised by Juvenna von Valancius.

traits.locale_text: 由于行商浪人的行动，杀害贾帕克家子嗣的凶手已经找到。凶手是伊西蒙德·苏尔贝克，他受卡米拉·德莱夫斯塔指使。然而，他们所有人都只是尤文娜·冯·瓦兰修斯精心操纵的棋子。

languages.text: Gracias a los esfuerzos de{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente, el asesino del heredero Gaprak ha sido descubierto. Se trata de Isimond Sauerback, que actuaba siguiendo órdenes de Camilla Drivestem. Sin embargo, todos ellos fueron víctima de la manipulación tramada por Juvenna von Valancius.
languages.original_text: Thanks to the Rogue Trader's efforts, the murderer of the Gaprak scion has been found. The killer is Isimond Sauerback, who was acting on the orders of Camilla Drivestem. All of them, however, were simply the victims of an elegant manipulation devised by Juvenna von Valancius.

traits.locale_text: Gracias a los esfuerzos de{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente, el asesino del heredero Gaprak ha sido descubierto. Se trata de Isimond Sauerback, que actuaba siguiendo órdenes de Camilla Drivestem. Sin embargo, todos ellos fueron víctima de la manipulación tramada por Juvenna von Valancius.

languages.text: [DRAFT]ガプラック軍は壊滅し、オヴェディウス伯爵自身は生き延びたが、カミラの命令でイシモンドに殺された[ことがわかった]。そしてユヴェンナ・フォン・ヴァランシウスが伯爵夫人の糸を引いていた。
languages.original_text: [DRAFTWe have]learnt that the Gaprak troops were destroyed, Count Ovedius himself survived, but he was killed by Isimond on Camilla's orders. And with Juvenna von Valancius pulling the Countess's strings.

languages.text: Hür Tacir'in çabaları sayesinde Gaprak varisinin katili bulundu. Katil, Camilla Drivestem'in emirleriyle hareket eden İsimond Sauerback. Ancak hepsi, Juvenna von Valancius'un tasarladığı zarif bir manipülasyonun kurbanlarıydı.
languages.original_text: Thanks to the Rogue Trader's efforts, the murderer of the Gaprak scion has been found. The killer is Isimond Sauerback, who was acting on the orders of Camilla Drivestem. All of them, however, were simply the victims of an elegant manipulation devised by Juvenna von Valancius.
